title: Arby — Fast Surrogate Modeling
description: Python library for fast data-driven surrogate modeling via reduced-order methods. Built for gravitational wave applications.

title: PiQC — Path-Integral Quantum Control
description: MATLAB/Python implementation of path-integral quantum control for open and closed quantum systems.

title: D-Wave Calibration (LANL)
description: Julia and MATLAB tools for calibration and benchmarking of the D-Wave quantum annealer, developed at LANL QCSS 2025.
